entityTypes.label: IDN
entityTypes.description: An IDN (in the recent past also called integrated health network [IHN] or multihospital system [MHS]) is a network of healthcare providers and facilities within a specific geographic region that offers a full range of healthcare services.

attributes.label: Status Information
attributes.name: StatusInformation
attributes.description: Set of attributes containing the details of the organization's status over time

attributes.label: Status Reason
attributes.name: StatusReason
attributes.description: Reason code for the selection of the status

attributes.label: Update Date
attributes.name: UpdateDate
attributes.description: Date on which the organization's status was updated

attributes.label: Comments
attributes.name: Comments
attributes.description: Comments related to the organization's status

attributes.label: Tradestyle Names
attributes.name: TradestyleNames
attributes.description: List of other names of the organzation, example, Registered Name

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: Describes the type of tradestyle name used by the organization

attributes.label: Language
attributes.name: Language
attributes.description: Describes the type of tradestyle name used by the organization

attributes.label: Name
attributes.name: Name
attributes.description: The value of the tradestyle name as used by the organization

attributes.label: Display Sequence
attributes.name: DisplaySequence
attributes.description: Defines the order in which this name is to be displayed relative to others

attributes.label: Start Date
attributes.name: StartDate
attributes.description: The date on which the tradestyle name went into active use

attributes.label: End Date
attributes.name: EndDate
attributes.description: The date on which the tradestyle name ceased being used

attributes.label: Legal Entity Type
attributes.name: LegalEntityType
attributes.description: Type of legal entity the company uses to operate

attributes.label: IDN Integration Level
attributes.name: IDNIntegrationLevel
attributes.description: Integration classification level that provides insight into how the Integrated Delivery Network approaches strategic decision making

attributes.label: Phone
attributes.name: Phone
attributes.description: Contact details for example, phone, fax number for the organization

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: Type of phone number e.g. Business, Fax, Mobile etc.

attributes.label: Unreachable
attributes.name: Unreachable
attributes.description: Indicator whether the number is reachable or not

attributes.label: Country Code
attributes.name: CountryCode
attributes.description: Two character Country Code to identify the ISD code of the phone number

attributes.label: Extension
attributes.name: Extension
attributes.description: Extension number to be used if any

attributes.label: Rank
attributes.name: Rank
attributes.description: Rank used to assign priority to a Phone number

attributes.label: Area Code
attributes.name: AreaCode
attributes.description: Area Code of the phone number

attributes.label: Local Number
attributes.name: LocalNumber
attributes.description: Local Number of the phone number without the area code

attributes.label: Validation Status
attributes.name: ValidationStatus
attributes.description: Validation Status denoting whether the number is valid or not

attributes.label: Format Mask
attributes.name: FormatMask
attributes.description: Format in which the number is saved, for example, (nnn) nnn-nnnn

attributes.label: Active
attributes.name: Active
attributes.description: Indicator whether phone number is active or not

attributes.label: Primary Phone Flag
attributes.name: PrimaryPhoneFlag
attributes.description: Indicator of whether or not the phone number is the primary number at which to reach the organization

attributes.label: Email
attributes.name: Email
attributes.description: Contact details of the organization, like Email Address

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: Type of Email, for example, Home, Work

attributes.label: Rank
attributes.name: Rank
attributes.description: Rank used to assign priority to a Email

attributes.label: Validation Status
attributes.name: ValidationStatus
attributes.description: Validation Status denoting whether the Email is valid or not

attributes.label: Active
attributes.name: Active
attributes.description: Indicator whether the email address is active or not

attributes.label: Identifiers
attributes.name: Identifiers
attributes.description: A business identifier associated with this IDN

attributes.label: Organization Summary Text
attributes.name: OrganizationSummaryText
attributes.description: Text that records a brief statement or account of this organization

attributes.label: Operating Status
attributes.name: OperatingStatus
attributes.description: Organization's functional state / trading status, e.g. active, out of business, dormant.

attributes.label: Ownership Status
attributes.name: OwnershipStatus
attributes.description: Text that describes the type of controlling ownership, e.g., publicly owned, privately owned, state owned.

attributes.label: Ownership Date
attributes.name: ControlOwnershipDate
attributes.description: The date when the current owners took over this business

attributes.label: Email Domain
attributes.name: EmailDomain
attributes.description: Email domain used by this organization

attributes.label: Standalone
attributes.name: Standalone
attributes.description: When 'true' indicates that this organization is not a member of a legal family tree. This means it cannot play the role of a subsidiary, parent, headquarters or branch; i.e., FamilyTreeMemberRoleText cannot be present. When 'false' indicates that this organization is a member of a legal family tree.

attributes.label: Vendor Verification Date
attributes.name: VendorVerificationDate
attributes.description: The date and time when this profile was last matched or enriched from an external vendor source

attributes.label: Vendor Verification Status
attributes.name: VendorVerificationStatus
attributes.description: The status value indicates the results of the matching and enrichment from an external source. Matching statuses are Match, No Match, and Match Error. Data enrichment statuses are Enriched, and Enrichment Error

attributes.label: Specialty
attributes.name: Specialities
attributes.description: Specific medical specialty of the IDN

attributes.label: Specialty Type
attributes.name: SpecialtyType
attributes.description: Specific medical specialty of the GPO

attributes.label: Specialty
attributes.name: Specialty
attributes.description: Specific medical specialty of the IDN

attributes.label: Taxonomy
attributes.name: Taxonomy
attributes.description: A unique 10-character code issued by CMS that designates organization's classification and specialization

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: Type of Taxonomy, for example, Primary

attributes.label: Classification
attributes.name: Classification
attributes.description: Classification of the taxonomy as assigned my CMS

matchGroups.label: BaseRule05: Fuzzy(Name); Exact(Address1, City or Zip5)
BaseRule06: Fuzzy(Name Metaphone); Exact(Address1, City or PostalCode)

analyticsAttributes.description: Function URI  for which validation has failed.

analyticsAttributes.label: Function Name
analyticsAttributes.description: Name of the Function for which validation has failed.
analyticsAttributes.name: FunctionName

analyticsAttributes.label: Expression
analyticsAttributes.description: Expression of the Function for which validation has failed.

analyticsAttributes.label: Attribute Name
analyticsAttributes.description: Name of the Attribute for which validation has failed.
